title: OSPF Operation and LSA Propagation
description: A flowchart illustrating the key steps and message exchanges in the OSPF (Open Shortest Path First) routing protocol, including neighbor discovery, database synchronization, and shortest path calculation.
relationships: Starts with Router Boots, leads to sending Hello Packets
Hello Packets lead to Neighbor Adjacency Formed
Adjacency leads to exchange of Database Description Packets
DD packets lead to sending Link-State Requests for outdated info
LSR triggers a Link-State Update from the neighbor
Receipt of LSU triggers a Link-State Acknowledgment
After DB sync, the SPF Algorithm Runs
SPF builds a Shortest Path Tree
Tree is used to Update the Routing Table
